title: saagpatel/IncidentWorkbench
summary: Local incident review desktop app — ingest from Jira/Slack, cluster with AI, and generate DOCX quarterly reports offline

title: ZeroDot1/LLMWikiNG
summary: LLMWikiNG is a local, privacy-friendly wiki platform developed by ZeroDot1 and based on the Karpathy LLM Wiki Pattern. The wiki is maintained and expanded by AI assistants—and you can easily read, search, and manage it right in your browser.

title: deepc0py/incant
summary: Natural language to shell commands with local LLMs. Rust TUI: press Ctrl+K, describe the command, get the exact incantation — Ollama by default (fully private), Claude/GPT optional. Sub-500ms, daemon-backed, with built-in destructive-command warnings.

title: olimorris/codecompanion.nvim
summary: ✨ AI Coding, Vim Style

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: warifmust/agenta
summary: A thin, self-hosted runtime for building, running, and observing AI agents, defined with config, not code.

title: ColinGPT9/clips-studio
summary: Local-first AI clipping studio - turn long videos into ready-to-post vertical Shorts entirely on your own PC. Multimodal clip detection, speaker-aware face tracking, editable captions, AI edit chat. No cloud AI, no fees.

title: RikyZ90/ShibaClaw
summary: 🐕 Self-hosted security-first AI agent · 28 providers · 11 chat channels · WebUI · 3-level memory · task-schedule · automation · skills · MCP

title: 0xberka/university-course-assistant
summary: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) assistant that answers university course questions using MongoDB Atlas Vector Search and Ollama.

title: Fortemi/fortemi
summary: Self-hosted AI knowledge base with hybrid semantic search (pgvector + FTS + RRF), MCP server, multi-provider LLM inference (Ollama, OpenAI, OpenRouter, llama.cpp), multimodal ingestion (vision, audio transcription, speaker diarization), and knowledge graph. Rust + PostgreSQL.

title: richhabits/sam
summary: A free, private, local-first AI assistant that actually does the work — 167 tools, a team of 78 AI agents, 40 rotating free AI brains, 25 skills. Not a chatbot, a doer. It doesn't just answer — it handles it.
